homepage.description.message: Applied Process Analysis and Modeling Laboratory at Sun Yat-sen University

homepage.labName.message: Applied Process Analysis and Modeling Laboratory

homepage.affiliation.message: School of Civil Engineering, Sun Yat-sen University

homepage.intro.message: The APAAM Laboratory is dedicated to computational geomechanics and multiscale numerical simulation research. We develop advanced computational methods and software tools for process simulation analysis and infrastructure disaster prevention and mitigation.

research.area1.desc.message: SDF framework, Fourier series particle model, machine learning acceleration, GPU parallel computing

research.area2.desc.message: CFD-DEM coupling, multiphase flow, porous media flow, fluid-structure coupling

research.area3.desc.message: Generative AI, shape characterization, constitutive modeling, computational acceleration

research.area4.desc.message: CT image reconstruction, morphology characterization, biocementation, multiscale modeling

homepage.address.message: Haiqin Building 1, Sun Yat-sen University Zhuhai Campus, Tangjiawan, Xiangzhou District, Zhuhai, Guangdong, China
